title: TEMPO AI
description: A minimal company profile site for the TEMPO AI product family, linking Lovalingo and Elson into one public company surface.
body:
TEMPO AI is the small public company profile site that connects the product family into one surface.

The recent commits created a minimal GitHub Pages-ready site: a brand page, product grid, global styling, metadata, CNAME, and deployment workflow. The page keeps the message simple: AI products that help teams scale faster, with Lovalingo and Elson as the first visible products.

## What changed in the recent commits

- Created the initial company profile site.
- Added product links for Lovalingo and Elson AI.
- Built the GitHub Pages workflow and triggered deployment.
- Added the apex domain configuration for the public site.

## Why it matters

Lovalingo and Elson are different products, but they need a common company layer. TEMPO AI gives that product family a small public home without overbuilding the company site before the products need it.

## Public boundary

This entry covers the public company website only. It does not include private company operations, credentials, analytics, or account data.
